top_signals.title: Chinese tourists flock to New Zealand under visa-waiver trial
top_signals.summary: China was New Zealand's second-largest source of tourists before the COVID-19 pandemic, but it has yet to return to those levels.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Exclusive: Russian ambassador was invited to box at Queen’s Club
top_signals.summary: The Russian ambassador to the UK was invited to sit in a box at Queen’s tennis club during last week’s 2026 HSBC Championship, City AM can reveal.  Andrey Kelin, who has been Vladimir Putin’s chief diplomat based in the UK since 2019, was photographed at the private tennis club in West London during the precursor [...]

top_signals.title: Treasure Hunt – Nova Scotia: Canada’s first mining frontier
top_signals.summary: Long before prospectors flooded the Klondike, Nova Scotia was already mining.

top_signals.title: Australia’s social media ban for under 16s having little impact, study shows
top_signals.summary: Underage users have been dodging the restrictions by using accounts registered to older people, setting up fake accounts, or by logging into private browsers.
